Records.authors: Becchetti, Matteo, Bonciani, Roberto, Casconi, Valerio, Del Duca, Vittorio, Moriello, Francesco
Records.description: Single planar 7-denominator two-loop topology with 2 ISPs contributing to the light-fermion electroweak corrections to Higgs plus jet production ($gg \to Hg$, $gq \to qH$, $q\bar{q} \to gH$). Three external massless legs ($p_1^2=p_2^2=p_3^2=0$), one off-shell Higgs leg ($p_4^2 \neq 0$), and two internal massive propagators carrying the electroweak boson mass $m_B$ (W or Z). The 48 master integrals are computed analytically via the canonical differential equations method after IBP reduction with FIRE5 and LiteRed. The alphabet contains a single square root $\sqrt{z(1+z)}$ which is rationalized by the substitution $z \to w^2/(1+2w)$, where $z=-p_4^2/(4m_B^2)$. All results are expressed as Goncharov multiple polylogarithms (GPLs) up to weight 4 in variables $x=-s/(4m_B^2)$, $y=-t/(4m_B^2)$, $w$. Boundary conditions are fixed at $s=t=p_4^2=0$ for most MIs. Numerical evaluation uses GiNaC, cross-checked against FIESTA in both Euclidean and Minkowski regions.
Records.location: Eq. (2.5) [DefTop] for propagators, Fig. 1 for topology, Appendix A for pre-canonical MIs, Appendix B for canonical basis

Records.authors: Becchetti, Matteo, Moriello, Francesco, Schweitzer, Armin
Records.description: Planar two-loop integral family for the mixed QCD-electroweak corrections to $gg \to Hg$, with 7 propagators (5 massless, 2 massive with mass $m_V$) and 2 irreducible scalar products. The 48 master integrals satisfy a canonical system of differential equations with a 25-letter alphabet involving 4 square roots. The MIs are expressible in terms of multiple polylogarithms and were computed analytically in arXiv:1805.10235. This paper provides an independent numerical evaluation via generalized power series expansions, with ancillary files for the DE matrices, boundary conditions, and amplitude form factors compatible with DiffExp.
